candidate_policy: For matching candidates, apply a shadow-only downgrade/check requiring stronger conversion evidence before treating OVER_1_5 as premium.
expected_effect: Reduce false positives in OVER_1_5 low-conversion clusters while preserving official baseline picks.
sample_requirements: Minimum 30 closed matching samples before promotion review; preferably 50+ if variance is high.
promotion_gate: Promotion requires better decision quality, no worse drawdown, no increased missed winners, and separate promotion gate approval.
